Notes: Add an A RR to an existing RRset using a different TTL than the pre-existing member; observe whether the server rejects the update, normalizes TTLs, or preserves divergent TTL handling internally.

Steps.Description: Prereq asserts the A RRset exists at ttl.campus.edu.; add a second A record for the same owner name with a different TTL.

Steps.Name: ttl.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe the post-update A RRset at ttl.campus.edu. to detect acceptance vs rejection and any normalization of the added RR.
